796ed4347e2a2569: [{"severity": "LOW", "confidence": 8, "path": "src/vectro_mojo/batch.mojo", "line": 28, "category": "mojo-memory", "summary": "Introducing `var row_copy = rows[i]` performs a full deep copy of each Float32 row on every loop iteration even though `quantize_row` only needs a borrowed read, violating value-semantics intent.", "fix": "Remove `row_copy` and pass `rows[i]` directly so the compiler can bind a borrow instead of materialising an owned copy; if `quantize_row`'s signature is `borrowed`, no copy occurs at the call site."}]
ac35c3d5dfd36f67: [{"severity":"HIGH","confidence":9,"path":"src/vectro_mojo/batch.mojo","line":28,"category":"mojo-perf","summary":"Each iteration copies the entire Float32 row into `row_copy` before passing it to `quantize_row`, which only needs a borrowed read — this is a needless O(N) allocation per row inside the hot encode loop.","fix":"Remove `var row_copy = rows[i]` and pass `rows[i]` directly to `quantize_row` so it receives a `borrowed` reference with no copy."}]
